name: Ginger and Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, ginger, cinnamon, allspice, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine egg, margarine, and molasses.
4. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Cover and chill dough for 1 hour.
6. Roll dough into 1-inch balls and place them 2 inches apart on an unprepared baking sheet.
7. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
